# Category: cloud_compute_security

{% extends "compute/instance/vm-template.yaml" %}

{% block metadata %}
{% set name_prefix = 'deployment-manager-' + env.project.id + '-' %}
{% set vm_name =  "test-" + region.split('-')[-1] | lower + '-'+ name_prefix %}


{% if not metadata %}
metadata:
  kind: templateParameter
  parameters:
    vmNamePrefix:
      description: 'The prefix for all resource names.'
      type: STRING
      required: 'True'
      default: "{{ vm_name }}"

    networkNamePrefix:
      description: 'The prefix used to create the name of the VPC and shared networks that will be created by this template. It should end in a unique string not used in the project.'
      type: STRING
      required: 'True'
    imageNameTag:
      description: 'Image name tag for image.'
      type: STRING
      required: 'True'
{% endif %}
{% endblock metadata %}
